channel.title: GitHub Discovery
channel.description: Discover trending GitHub repos before they go viral

item.title: 🔥 alibaba/page-agent — 23342⭐ (82.2/day)
item.description:
JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks — 49161⭐ (114.9/day)
item.description:
Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
Score: 100/100 | Language: JavaScript

item.description:

Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 CoplayDev/unity-mcp — 11712⭐ (24.8/day)
item.description:
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

item.title: 🔥 anthropics/claude-code — 135946⭐ (274.1/day)
item.description:
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 supabase/supabase — 105596⭐ (43.0/day)
item.description:
The Postgres development platform. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 diegosouzapw/OmniRoute — 8876⭐ (64.8/day)
item.description:

Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript
